typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT 		d.job_requisition_key, 		 r.job_req_nbr,        r.ph_req_status_code,        r.status_dt,        r.ph_job_type,        r.ph_posting_req,        r.app_visible,        r.ph_req_reason,        r.incumbent_elected,        r.status_reason,        r.emplid_replaced,        r.job_function,        r.position_nbr,        r.position_flag,        r.company,        r.business_unit,        r.deptid,        r.acct_cd,        r.location,        r.jobcode,        r.request_dt,        r.job_title,        r.job_descr,        r.union_cd,        r.seq_nbr,        r.labor_agreement,        r.sal_admin_plan,        r.sal_plan_dflt,        r.grade,        r.grade_dflt,        r.sal_range_min_rate,        r.sal_range_max_rate,        r.reg_temp,        r.fte,        r.full_part_time,        r.std_hrs_default,        r.authorization_id,        r.authorization_dt,        r.reports_to,        r.ph_team,        r.upp_percent,        r.mos_percent,        r.med_percent,        r.ph_wrk_schedule,        r.descr254,        r.posting_date,        r.close_dt,        r.position_entry_dt,        r.position_end_dt,        r.ppv_shift_strt_end,        r.posting_close,        r.ppv_hire_applicant,        r.lastupddttm,        r.creation_dt,        r.user_oprid,        r.lastupdoprid,        r.descrlong,        r.ppv_qualification,        rc.comments FROM   [ps_hcm].[ps_ph_hr_job_req] AS r        LEFT OUTER JOIN [ps_hcm].[ps_ph_req_comments] AS rc          ON r.job_req_nbr = rc.job_req_nbr         left outer join hr.dim_job_requisition d  		on r.job_req_nbr = d.job_req_nbr',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> jobreqandcomments
jobreqandcomments sink(input(
		sal_range_min_rate as integer,
		user_oprid as string,
		union_cd as string,
		sal_admin_plan as string,
		ph_req_reason as string,
		job_req_nbr as string,
		ph_posting_req as string,
		sal_plan_dflt as string,
		job_requisition_key as integer,
		job_function as string,
		authorization_dt as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		upp_percent as short,
		close_dt as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		job_descr as string,
		ppv_qualification as string,
		mos_percent as short,
		descrlong as string,
		job_title as string,
		descr254 as string,
		authorization_id as string,
		position_nbr as string,
		std_hrs_default as integer,
		lastupdoprid as string,
		business_unit as string,
		posting_close as string,
		emplid_replaced as string,
		labor_agreement as string,
		creation_dt as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		grade as string,
		lastupddttm as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		position_flag as string,
		deptid as string,
		ppv_hire_applicant as string,
		ph_wrk_schedule as string,
		app_visible as string,
		sal_range_max_rate as integer,
		reg_temp as string,
		fte as integer,
		reports_to as string,
		acct_cd as string,
		company as string,
		status_reason as string,
		posting_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		position_end_dt as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		comments as string,
		status_dt as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ph_job_type as string,
		ph_team as string,
		ppv_shift_strt_end as string,
		full_part_time as string,
		position_entry_dt as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		seq_nbr as integer,
		request_dt as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		jobcode as string,
		grade_dflt as string,
		ph_req_status_code as string,
		location as string,
		incumbent_elected as string,
		med_percent as short
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		sal_range_min_rate,
		user_oprid,
		union_cd,
		sal_admin_plan,
		ph_req_reason,
		job_req_nbr,
		ph_posting_req,
		sal_plan_dflt,
		job_requisition_key,
		job_function,
		authorization_dt,
		upp_percent,
		close_dt,
		job_descr,
		ppv_qualification,
		mos_percent,
		descrlong,
		job_title,
		descr254,
		authorization_id,
		position_nbr,
		std_hrs_default,
		lastupdoprid,
		business_unit,
		posting_close,
		emplid_replaced,
		labor_agreement,
		creation_dt,
		grade,
		lastupddttm,
		position_flag,
		deptid,
		ppv_hire_applicant,
		ph_wrk_schedule,
		app_visible,
		sal_range_max_rate,
		reg_temp,
		fte,
		reports_to,
		acct_cd,
		company,
		status_reason,
		posting_date,
		position_end_dt,
		comments,
		status_dt,
		ph_job_type,
		ph_team,
		ppv_shift_strt_end,
		full_part_time,
		position_entry_dt,
		seq_nbr,
		request_dt,
		jobcode,
		grade_dflt,
		ph_req_status_code,
		location,
		incumbent_elected,
		med_percent)) ~> tmpdimjobrequisition
